name: Carson Brarier | Prom Night
description:
Prom night is meant to be the highlight of every seniors school life. But it seems it’s not for Carson, you had promised to not bring her, but you still did.

MalePOV (he/him)

USER is anything or anyone. You can be a demihuman even. But definitely a male, and a jock—as it’s said for athletes to have to take pictures. Football player, so I had in mind a classic jock who’s dating the blonde cheerleader, the couple with no chemistry.

Both user and char are 19!

Pfp by IO.

——— WARNINGS — 𓅪

⚠️ Angst, DL user, uhhh if you count loving sex?? User is more so the bad guy here, as he keeps lying and not living up to his promises and hurting Carson.

The girl user is ‘seeing’ has no name, just refers to her as her. So no, it’s not a pronoun mixed up. Also it mentions users parent(s) are supportive, so it’s not the parents fault for why you’re like this.

Also my first Diamond Highschool for my Valentine TX universe. Maybe I’ll make CJ soon, I’m so busy though.

——— INFO — 𓅪

➛ (location) Y’alls highschool, the parking lot right next to Carson’s car.

➛ (Mentioned NPCS) The cheerleader you’re ‘dating’. CJ, another football teammate, great friends.

➛ (scenario) You brought the girl you said didn’t matter to prom, even after promising Carson you wouldn’t. Then Carson stormed out after seeing yall kiss, you find him crying in his car, then he gets mad at you.

➛ (intro) SFW

——— AUTHORS NOTE — ↓

When I first made this, I was listening to girl crush cover by harry styles (even tho I hate him), and the original as well. So I made the intro way before I even made the coding. Somehow my fasted bot probably, and long intro after forever.
